data.title: Add RED tests for review-batch-groups.sh behavioral contract (efe7-7f1d T1)
data.description:
## Story
efe7-7f1d — Batch-group dispatch for large-refactor conformance checking

## Testing Mode
RED — tests must fail before T2 creates the script

## What
Create `tests/scripts/test-review-batch-groups.sh` using the raw counter pattern (tests/scripts/ convention):
```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
PASS=0; FAIL=0
```

## Test functions (5 behavioral tests)

### test_batch_groups_respects_max_agents_cap
With 10 files and MAX_AGENTS=3:
- Output must have exactly 3 GROUP_N: lines
- Each group has at least 1 file
```bash
test_batch_groups_respects_max_agents_cap() {
    local desc="test_batch_groups_respects_max_agents_cap"
    local files; files=$(printf 'file%d.py\n' {1..10})
    local output; output=$(echo "$files" | MAX_AGENTS=3 bash "$REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso/scripts/review-batch-groups.sh")
    local group_count; group_count=$(echo "$output" | grep -c '^GROUP_[0-9]\+:' || true)
    if [ "$group_count" -eq 3 ]; then
        echo "PASS: $desc"; PASS=$((PASS+1))
    else
        echo "FAIL: $desc — expected 3 groups, got $group_count"; FAIL=$((FAIL+1))
    fi
}
```

### test_batch_groups_distributes_evenly
With 6 files and MAX_AGENTS=3:
- 3 groups of 2 files each
```bash
test_batch_groups_distributes_evenly() {
    local desc="test_batch_groups_distributes_evenly"
    local files; files=$(printf 'file%d.py\n' {1..6})
    local output; output=$(echo "$files" | MAX_AGENTS=3 bash "$REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso/scripts/review-batch-groups.sh")
    local all_correct=1
    while IFS= read -r line; do
        [[ "$line" =~ ^GROUP_[0-9]+: ]] || continue
        local count; count=$(echo "$line" | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -c '\.py$' || true)
        [ "$count" -eq 2 ] || all_correct=0
    done <<< "$output"
    if [ "$all_correct" -eq 1 ]; then
        echo "PASS: $desc"; PASS=$((PASS+1))
    else
        echo "FAIL: $desc — groups not evenly distributed"; FAIL=$((FAIL+1))
    fi
}
```

### test_batch_groups_handles_remainder
With 7 files and MAX_AGENTS=3:
- 3 groups; first group(s) get the extra file(s)
```bash
test_batch_groups_handles_remainder() {
    local desc="test_batch_groups_handles_remainder"
    local files; files=$(printf 'file%d.py\n' {1..7})
    local output; output=$(echo "$files" | MAX_AGENTS=3 bash "$REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso/scripts/review-batch-groups.sh")
    local group_count; group_count=$(echo "$output" | grep -c '^GROUP_[0-9]\+:' || true)
    local total_files; total_files=$(echo "$output" | grep '^GROUP_[0-9]\+:' | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -c '\.py$' || true)
    if [ "$group_count" -eq 3 ] && [ "$total_files" -eq 7 ]; then
        echo "PASS: $desc"; PASS=$((PASS+1))
    else
        echo "FAIL: $desc — expected 3 groups with 7 total files, got group_count=$group_count total_files=$total_files"; FAIL=$((FAIL+1))
    fi
}
```

### test_batch_groups_single_group
With 3 files and MAX_AGENTS=5:
- Only 3 groups (can't have more groups than files)
```bash
test_batch_groups_single_group() {
    local desc="test_batch_groups_single_group"
    local files; files=$(printf 'file%d.py\n' {1..3})
    local output; output=$(echo "$files" | MAX_AGENTS=5 bash "$REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso/scripts/review-batch-groups.sh")
    local group_count; group_count=$(echo "$output" | grep -c '^GROUP_[0-9]\+:' || true)
    if [ "$group_count" -eq 3 ]; then
        echo "PASS: $desc"; PASS=$((PASS+1))
    else
        echo "FAIL: $desc — expected 3 groups (min(files,MAX_AGENTS)), got $group_count"; FAIL=$((FAIL+1))
    fi
}
```

### test_batch_groups_exits_0
With any valid input, script exits 0:
```bash
test_batch_groups_exits_0() {
    local desc="test_batch_groups_exits_0"
    local files; files=$(printf 'file%d.py\n' {1..4})
    if echo "$files" | MAX_AGENTS=2 bash "$REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso/scripts/review-batch-groups.sh" >/dev/null; then
        echo "PASS: $desc"; PASS=$((PASS+1))
    else
        echo "FAIL: $desc — expected exit 0"; FAIL=$((FAIL+1))
    fi
}
```

## Run all tests + summary
```bash
test_batch_groups_respects_max_agents_cap
test_batch_groups_distributes_evenly
test_batch_groups_handles_remainder
test_batch_groups_single_group
test_batch_groups_exits_0

echo ""
echo "=== Summary: $PASS passed, $FAIL failed ==="
[ "$FAIL" -gt 0 ] && exit 1 || exit 0
```

## .test-index entry
```
plugins/dso/scripts/review-batch-groups.sh: tests/scripts/test-review-batch-groups.sh [test_batch_groups_respects_max_agents_cap] [test_batch_groups_distributes_evenly] [test_batch_groups_handles_remainder]
```

## PASS/FAIL criteria
All 5 tests must FAIL before T2 creates the script (script path does not exist → bash error).
After T2: all 5 must PASS.
